ccache /usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wall -Wextra -flto-odr-type-merging -Walloc-zero -Wcast-qual -Wconversion -Wdeprecated -Wduplicated-branches -Wduplicated-cond -Wimplicit-fallthrough=2 -Wlogical-op -Wno-psabi -Wno-sign-conversion -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-unused-parameter -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wodr -Wpointer-arith -Wsign-compare -Wvla -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -Wno-redundant-move -Wno-stringop-overflow -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/binlog_dump.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/binlog_dump.dir/td/db/binlog/binlog_dump.cpp.o -o binlog_dump  libtddb.a ../tdactor/libtdactor.a ../tdutils/libtdutils.a ../sqlite/libtdsqlite.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
